page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c2.xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs mapped directly to 16 physical cores, operating with 1.0 thread per core. The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per physical core.

This server configuration does not include local storage, meaning all storage operations must rely on external network-attached volumes. Additionally, the instance features zero GPUs, making it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated graphics or parallel computing workloads. There are also zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this instance.

The dedicated CPU allocation and 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio offer a balanced resource profile for workloads requiring predictable compute performance without hyperthreading interference. This configuration is suitable for general-purpose applications, web serving, application servers, and distributed systems that require dedicated physical cores but do not require local disk storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c2.xlarge is an x86_64 server instance featuring 16 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 16 physical cores with 1.0 thread per core, running on the KVM hypervisor. It is configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 4.0 GB memory-to-core ratio. The instance does not include local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions, and lacks GPU hardware accelerators. It also provides zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. With dedicated CPU allocation and a balanced resource profile, this instance is designed for general-purpose workloads, application servers, and web serving environments that benefit from dedicated physical cores and predictable compute performance without hyperthreading.
